query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS equipes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  nome VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  tipo ENUM('musica', 'grupo_oracao', 'leitura', 'acolhida', 'outro') NOT NULL,
  descricao TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS membros (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  equipeId INT NOT NULL,
  nome VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320),
  telefone VARCHAR(20),
  funcao VARCHAR(100),
  instrumento VARCHAR(100),
  status ENUM('ativo', 'inativo') DEFAULT 'ativo' NOT NULL,
  fotoUrl VARCHAR(500),
  observacoes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (equipeId) REFERENCES equipes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS disponibilidades (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  membroId INT NOT NULL,
  diaSemana INT NOT NULL,
  periodo ENUM('manha', 'tarde', 'noite', 'dia_todo') NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (membroId) REFERENCES membros(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS indisponibilidades (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  membroId INT NOT NULL,
  dataInicio DATE NOT NULL,
  dataFim DATE NOT NULL,
  motivo VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (membroId) REFERENCES membros(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
